caliber.b_semantics: dp (E1F dp caliber, E0dpf-gated): each microbatch lane m serves its own distinct B_mb_global=128 sequences (TP rank r holds rows [r*bl,(r+1)*bl) at bl=32 per GPU per lane); 2 lanes in flight -> B_total=256 distinct sequences, 64 KV rows per GPU; throughput is measured, no conversion
caliber.graphs: per lane x per family stateful CUDA graphs (E0sf), lane-owned MoE graph slots (1+3m,2+3m,3+3m), per-lane per-family pools; slots_per_shape=7, eager slot 0 shared
caliber.kv: seeded decode residency at position 2048 (deterministic-seeded-KV-not-real-prefix, E1a27); max_seq_len=2432; per-lane seeds lane_seed = seed + 7919*(m+1)
caliber.pipeline_form: PP4 rotating interleave, 2 microbatches in flight; iteration j of every stage serves lane j%L at position start+j//L; per-lane token loop closes with L-iteration pipeline latency (head -> argmax -> loopback pair -> embed); serial per-iteration handoff, no compute/transport overlap (out of scope this vertical)
caliber.timing: host walls around torch.cuda.synchronize per component (E0qf serial decomposition caliber)
caliber.transport: NCCL P2P fixed endpoints per lane, no-GDR

gate_record.judgment: per lane: solo serial run (graph, lazy capture, per-step bitwise graph-vs-eager twin) -> restore -> all lanes interleaved over the same positions; token digest trajectory, final KV digests, and cursor terminal must be bitwise identical solo vs interleaved (no cross-talk)
